positive: A highly stylized, maximalist pattern design featuring interconnected celestial bodies, abstract geometric constellations, and stylized woodland fauna (like crescent moons and leaping deer silhouettes). The primary color palette is deep indigo, cosmic sapphire, burnt orange, and metallic gold accents. The composition must be highly symmetrical and radial, designed as a seamless repeating tile print (all-over print effect). The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau fluidity with modern sacred geometry, creating a strong, sophisticated contrast. Use clean vector line work combined with rich, luminous color washes, optimized for DTG print fabric texture, high contrast, and immediate visual impact. No photorealism; focus on bold outlines and solid color blocks.
negative: photorealism, blurry, noise, amateur drawing, text, watermark, logo, copyright, signature, low detail, extra limbs, mutated, poor anatomy, grainy, ugly, artifacts
